channel.title: EDA on Bervelin Lumesa
channel.description: Recent content in EDA on Bervelin Lumesa

item.title: Introduction to Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) with R
item.description: In this article, we describe what Exploratory Data Analysis is and see how to perform it with R. Introduction to R and Rstudio R is an open-source software environment for statistical computing and graphics. R compiles and runs on Windows, Mac OS X, and numerous UNIX platforms (such as Linux). The R software project was first started by Robert Gentleman and Ross Ihaka. As of 2022, there were more than 3,000 such packages hosted on CRAN.
